a.xlink:title: AutoResearch-style helper: set an exclusive driver by name.
Extract the encoder selector from a compile-time TIMING type.
Convert compile-time CHIPSET type to runtime timing config.
Fill a range of LEDs with a solid color.
Build expected UCS7604 encoded bytes from LED data.
Dump raw edge timing data to console for debugging.
Check if an encoder selector identifies a UCS7604 variant.
Enable only one driver exclusively (disables all others) — by-name escape hatch.
